selection_notes: Metadata-only seed for wiring the reusable BugSwarm arena source into the GLM-5.2 comparison report.
The image tag is the public square/okio artifact used in the official BugSwarm experiment setup tutorial.
This seed does not prove RED/GREEN behavior; run bugswarm_verify_source.py --execute before scheduling live GLM-5.2 cells.

2026-07-11: extended from 1 to 13 artifacts via the real BugSwarm REST API (bugswarm-common DatabaseAPI, unauthenticated, no fabricated data) per docs/proposals/bugfix-archetype-corpus-and-harness.md Slice 2 — filtered for non-flaky, genuine code-level fixes with small (<=3 file, <=15 line) diffs and bounded (1-5) failing tests across well-known Java/Python OSS repos, diversified across repos. None of the 12 new entries are live RED/GREEN verified yet (Slice 3, Docker-gated, operator step) — every verified_red/verified_green stays false until bugswarm_apply_verification.py records real execute-mode evidence.

artifacts.selection_note: Official BugSwarm tutorial artifact; the tutorial documents run_failed.sh and run_passed.sh execution in fresh containers.

artifacts.reproducibility: reproducible (5/5 BugSwarm reproduce_successes at query time)
artifacts.selection_note: BugSwarm REST API filter (queried 2026-07-11): lang in [Java,Python], reproduce_successes=5 (non-flaky), num_of_changed_files<=3, changes<=15, classification.code=Yes (genuine code fix, not build/test-only), 1<=num_tests_failed<=5 (bounded, not mass breakage: 3/343 tests). Exception(s) at failure: AssertionError. Not yet live-verified (verified_red/verified_green false until bugswarm_verify_source.py --execute runs).
